justification: The diff successfully migrates from JUnit 4 to JUnit 5 (replacing @RunWith, @Before, ExpectedException with JUnit 5 equivalents like @BeforeEach, assertThrows) and updates Spring Boot 2.4 to 3.3 (Jakarta EE, SecurityFilterChain, constructor injection). It uses Java 21 idioms like String.formatted() and List.getFirst(). However, it retains deprecated Mockito usage (initMocks) and doesn't fully modernize all test patterns, preventing a perfect score.
